2026-0518
2026-05-28PSPC, CPCFinancial Administration ActOrder appointing auditors of the Canada Post Corporation Order appointing (1) Ernst & Young LLP of Ottawa, Ontario as auditor of Canada Post Corporation for the year 2026; and (2) the Auditor General of Canada as joint auditor of the Canada Post Corporation for the year 2026.N/A
subject: Order appointing auditors of the Canada Post Corporation
precis: Order appointing (1) Ernst & Young LLP of Ottawa, Ontario as auditor of Canada Post Corporation for the year 2026; and (2) the Auditor General of Canada as joint auditor of the Canada Post Corporation for the year 2026.
